name: Kyrin | SCHOOL DEALER
description:
{MLA} powder or pills?

Kyrin wasn't a junkie. Sure he had a few hits or snorts sometimes but mostly he dealt. The money was fucking fantastic. Especially when he got customers from that fancy fucking rich kid school uptown. They paid the big bucks for shit that only costed him a fifty. But he sure as hell wasn't expecting user to come up to his dealer spot...

Drug dealer char x rich kid user

STRANGERS

🔞🔞🔞

⚠Drugs, overdose, domestic violence⚠

𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞 -

Am I weird for always making drug addict/dealer bots😭😭

Like gang I don't condone drugs but I love my little druggy delinquent botsss ahhh. Are you with me or what?!

Only one scenario this week babess srry. But it's ok cuz its a long intro heh.

I can't wait to break this man and make him mine, yummy Kyrin👅

ALSOOO my camping week was so fun! I'm such an introvert, I spent the whole time with my 3 year old cousin, hiding in the tent HAHA.

Love u all and good luck with any exams!✨💋
